summary: Chapter 15 creative writing sub-pipeline completed. All three post-draft specialists passed: (1) POV voice maintainer confirmed Kaelith's voice consistency with 2 minor corrections applied (meta-reference fix, paragraph consolidation); (2) Continuity integrator verified exhaustive cross-chapter consistency across spatial/temporal, character knowledge, bond mechanics, magic system, naming, and information asymmetry — zero violations; (3) Craft enforcer audited all 16 active craft tools with 15 PASS and 1 MINOR (mystery box count slightly above target range but acceptable given imminent resolution cascade). Zero FAIL ratings. Chapter 15 draft is cleared for the revision pipeline.
